overall.description: First-person perspective walking through a dense forest at night, illuminated by a flashlight or headlamp. The footage appears to be from a video game engine, featuring tall trees, undergrowth, and a narrow dirt path winding through the woods.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark forest trail with dense tree cover and undergrowth

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the narrow forest path, flashlight illuminating the rocky trail and surrounding trees

entered.detail: narrow winding trail through the forest floor with scattered stones and exposed roots
thick deciduous tree trunks lining the left side of the path
thick deciduous tree trunks lining the right side of the path
small stones and rocks embedded in the dirt path
low ferns and bushes growing alongside the trail

segments.scene_description: The camera moves steadily forward through a dark forest at night, illuminated by a flashlight. Tall trees flank both sides of a narrow dirt path scattered with rocks, while low undergrowth lines the trail edges. The environment is dense and enclosed, with only partial visibility of the night sky through the tree canopy.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement through a dense, nocturnal forest illuminated by a narrow beam of light. It begins by pushing steadily along a dirt path, where the flashlight reveals a rugged trail scattered with rocks. As the camera advances, the view is tightly framed by towering trees and thick undergrowth that line the edges of the path. The scene remains enclosed and oppressive, with the light cutting through the darkness to reveal only fragmented glimpses of the night sky through the heavy canopy above.
